channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: i Politics: The claims Reform's Makerfield candidate is facing - and his controversial links
item.description: The claims Reform's Makerfield candidate is facing - and his controversial links

item.title: Independent UK Politics: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch brands watering down Russia oil sanctions ‘insane’
item.description: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch brands watering down Russia oil sanctions ‘insane’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Planned fuel duty rise to be scrapped, says Starmer as he defends changes to Russian oil sanctions – UK politics live
item.description: Planned fuel duty rise to be scrapped, says Starmer as he defends changes to Russian oil sanctions – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Drakeford links Welsh Labour's collapse to lack of new powers from UK government
item.description: Drakeford links Welsh Labour's collapse to lack of new powers from UK government

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
Independent UK Politics: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
